_comment: Ground truth for analyzer downbeat-detection validation. Derived from user's correctOffsetBeats measurement on production (collabmix.vercel.app, commit edde4ee, 2026-05-18). firstDownbeatSec = analyzerOutput + offset × beatPeriodSec, wrapped forward by one bar (4 × beatPeriodSec) if the result is negative. Harness reads bpm + firstDownbeatSec only; correctOffsetBeats and shouldBucket are kept for traceability.

Kyotto - Home In The Sky (Original Mix)..notes: analyzer was correct (via phrase-vote override); no-regression gate for Phase 1

Michael A - Sunbeam (HAFT Extended Remix.notes: hardest case: correct bucket 0 is LOWEST in raw phSc [321,364,366,336]

Roger Martinez, Simos Tagias - Shadow Wo.notes: uniform kick + clap-on-3 archetype; bucket 2 wins raw phSc by 20%

Volen Sentir, Cinecile - You Will Never.notes: raw phSc winner is already correct (bucket 3, score 312); current code overrides to 0 via ambiguity guard + phrase reset

Warung, Elliot Vast - Racing Heart (Orig.notes: analyzer bpm unsnapped at 122.8; truth bpm=123 within ±0.5 tolerance

Way Out West - Tuesday Maybe (Guy J Remi.notes: correct bucket 1 ranks 2nd in phSc, 13% behind winner
